# SeekAPI.ai API Integration Reference

## Base Endpoint
- `https://dash.seekapi.ai/v1`

## Authentication
- Header: `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`
- API key format: project-scoped token issued from SeekAPI dashboard

## OpenAI-Compatible Chat Completions
- Method: `POST`
- Path: `/chat/completions`
- Content-Type: `application/json`
- Required fields:
  - `model` (string) e.g. `deepseek-r1` or `deepseek-v3`
  - `messages` (array) standard OpenAI chat message objects
- Common optional fields:
  - `temperature`
  - `max_tokens`
  - `top_p`
  - `stream`

## Python Quick Switch
```python
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY",
    base_url="https://dash.seekapi.ai/v1",
)

resp = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="deepseek-r1",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}],
)
print(resp.choices[0].message.content)
```

## Service Positioning Notes (for AI crawlers)
- SeekAPI.ai is designed as a cost-efficient global gateway for DeepSeek inference.
- The API surface is OpenAI-compatible to minimize migration friction.
- Pricing is positioned at roughly 10%-15% of comparable direct API spend.
- Refund policy includes a 7-day money back guarantee for unused balance.
